title: Amethyst Equipment
description: This mod adds amethyst tools, a sword, armor, and horse armor!
body:
# Amethyst Equipment Mod

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UUffNxLR/images/6113a7b8348cbeea512b2784fd58d99f405febbd.png)

## Enhance your arsenal with the Amethyst Equipment Mod!

Discover the power of amethyst with this mod, which introduces a full set of tools, weapons, and armor crafted from amethyst shards. While amethyst equipment is strong, it has low durability to balance its abundance and accessibility.

## Features:

- Amethyst Tools and Sword: Strong and efficient, but with low durability (44 uses).
- Amethyst Armor: Provides solid protection with armor ratings of 4 (helmet), 5 (chestplate), 6 (leggings), and 2 (boots), but breaks quickly.
- Amethyst Horse Armor: Adds extra protection for your horse with a rating of 4.
- Crafting: Use amethyst shards like ingots to craft equipment. Note that amethyst equipment cannot be recycled.

## Stats:

- Durability: 44 uses
- Efficiency: 15
- Attack Damage: 0.5
- Tool Enchantability: 1
- Armor Enchantability: 8

## Balanced Gameplay:

- Strong equipment balanced by its quick breakage, ensuring a fair gameplay experience.
- Ideal for players looking for a powerful yet temporary gear option.

## Seamless Integration:

- Crafting recipes that fit naturally within the vanilla Minecraft system.

With the Amethyst Equipment Mod, you can take advantage of the plentiful amethyst resources to craft powerful gear, perfect for short-term use and quick adventures.

_Download now and gear up with the shimmering strength of amethyst!_
